highlights.description: Native telephony audio format support (ulaw, alaw, G.711) for seamless Twilio Media Streams integration

added.description: Telephony codec support in OmniVoice format mapping: `ulaw`, `mulaw`, `g711u` -> `ulaw_8000` and `alaw`, `g711a` -> `alaw_8000`
Recognition of `ulaw_`, `alaw_`, `opus_` prefixes as valid ElevenLabs output formats
8kHz PCM output format (`pcm_8000`) for telephony sample rates

internal.description: Exclude local `omnivoice/examples/` from version control (examples moved to `agentplexus/omnivoice-examples`)

highlights.description: OmniVoice provider integration - use ElevenLabs as a drop-in TTS/STT/Agent provider in the OmniVoice voice pipeline framework

added.description: OmniVoice TTS provider (`omnivoice/tts`) implementing `tts.Provider` and `tts.StreamingProvider` interfaces
OmniVoice STT provider (`omnivoice/stt`) implementing `stt.Provider` and `stt.StreamingProvider` interfaces
OmniVoice Agent provider (`omnivoice/agent`) with session management for conversational AI
Format conversion utilities for mapping OmniVoice configs to ElevenLabs parameters
Debug and simple TTS examples (`examples/debug-test`, `examples/simple`)

documentation.description: OmniVoice integration guide with TTS, STT, and Agent provider documentation
Rebuild MkDocs site with OmniVoice section

internal.description: Migrate to structured-changelog format for machine-readable changelog

highlights.description: Null handling fix for API responses, voice settings presets for learning platforms, and PCM-to-WAV audio utilities

fixed.description: JSON decoding errors for nullable API response fields using ogen-tools post-processing (`ogen-fixnull`, `ogen-fixerror`)

added.description: Voice settings presets for learning platforms: Udemy, YouTube, TikTok, podcast, audiobook, and more
PCM to WAV audio conversion utilities (`PCMBytesToWAV`, `PCMToWAV`)
`ParseAPIError()` function for structured error extraction from API responses
`IsForbiddenError()` helper for 403 status code detection
Output format validation for TTS requests

documentation.description: Voice settings presets guide for LMS courses

highlights.description: Real-time voice agent capabilities: WebSocket STT/TTS streaming, speech-to-speech conversion, and Twilio phone integration

added.description: WebSocket TTS streaming for real-time text-to-speech synthesis
WebSocket STT streaming for real-time speech-to-text transcription
Speech-to-speech conversion service for voice transformation
Twilio phone integration for telephony voice agents
`cmd/ttsscript` CLI for batch TTS generation from scripts

highlights.description: MkDocs documentation site with comprehensive API reference and guides

added.description: MkDocs documentation site with Material theme
Comprehensive service documentation for all ElevenLabs APIs
Getting started guides, examples, and utility documentation

highlights.description: Initial release - comprehensive Go client for ElevenLabs API with TTS, STT, voice cloning, and audio generation services

added.description: Text-to-Speech (TTS) service with streaming support and voice settings
Speech-to-Text (STT) transcription service
Voice management: list, get, clone, and design voices
Voice design service for creating custom AI voices
Text-to-Dialogue service for multi-speaker conversations
Sound effects generation service
Music generation service
Audio isolation service for removing background noise
Dubbing service for video localization
Forced alignment service for audio-text synchronization
Projects service for managing long-form content
Pronunciation dictionary service with PLS export
History service for accessing generated audio
User and subscription management
Models service for listing available TTS models
Retry HTTP client wrapper for resilient API calls
TTSScript compiler for scripted audio generation
Premade voices package with voice metadata and filtering
